package sample

import "context"

type Rows interface{}

type DB interface {
	QueryContext(context.Context, string, ...any) (Rows, error)
}

type Store struct {
	db DB
}

func (s *Store) Load(ctx context.Context, id int) error {
	_, err := s.db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM widgets WHERE id = ?", id)
	return err
}
